title: British actor Anthony Head dies at 72, leaving a legacy across Buffy, Ted Lasso and Merlin
summary_full: Veteran British actor Anthony Head, celebrated for his roles in Buffy the Vampire Slayer and Ted Lasso, has passed away at 72. His career, spanning over four decades, included iconic advertising campaigns and beloved television dramas. Head's family confirmed his peaceful death, remembering him as an extraordinary father whose extensive work will be remembered by generations.
